tasks.subject: Task 1: nextScheduledNight selector
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure selector that picks the soonest upcoming planned night (movie unattached, dated today-or-later), or null.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/lib/nights.ts`
- Test: `mobile/lib/nights.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nights.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/nights.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nights.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["null for empty/past/movie-attached", "single upcoming planned returned", "soonest of several returned", "today included", "injectable today param"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: UpNextCard component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A presentational countdown card for a scheduled night — ember spotlight treatment, countdown pill, serif date, picker row + coming avatars, Start/Edit actions.

**Files:**
- Create: `mobile/components/UpNextCard.tsx`
- Modify: `mobile/components/index.ts`

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/components/UpNextCard.tsx", "mobile/components/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tag + solid-ember countdown pill", "serif weekday+date", "picker row + up to 4 overlapping avatars", "Start (primary) + Edit (secondary)", "theme tokens only, no hardcoded values"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire the home to lead with the card
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fetch nights alongside the turn, derive `nextScheduledNight`, and render the `UpNextCard` (planned state) or the existing `SpotlightHero` (fallback).

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/app/(tabs)/index.tsx`

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/(tabs)/index.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["listNights fetched with turn via Promise.all, loading gates both", "nights failure degrades to spotlight", "card + Plan another night when scheduled", "spotlight + skip + See full rotation when none", "On deck in both states"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
